response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song performance from 00:00 to 04:36, followed by a talking segment from 04:36 to 05:00. 2. Identified the song title from on-screen text as 'ココロパズルリズム' and performer as '儒烏風亭らでん'. 3. Searched for 'ココロパズルリズム' and found it is a song originally by SMAP. 4. Retrieved lyrics for 'ココロパズルリズム' from search results and validated them against on-screen lyrics in the video. 5. Mapped scenes and constructed JSON with metadata and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A 3D live performance of the song 'ココロパズルリズム' (Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm), originally by SMAP, performed by the VTuber Jofutei Raden. The performance is followed by an introductory talk.

scenes.description: VTuber Jofutei Raden performs a 3D live cover of the song 'ココロパズルリズム'. Visuals include a giant puzzle screen in the background.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
As for the future, look at all the pieces
Deciding how to assemble them is up to you
One by one, living for tomorrow, this is the puzzle and rhythm of the heart
I can't say it well, but
It feels strangely reassuring
This feeling of being able to be here
It's like a puzzle
We've had reserved seats since long ago
Come on, hold hands
We'll surely become one
Even if we can see the completion
It doesn't go smoothly, does it?
Each of us is a piece of a dream, right?
As for the future, look at all the pieces
Deciding how to assemble them is up to you
One by one, living for tomorrow, filling the empty gaps
There will surely be fun things, but
More important than that
When you're sad, when you're happy
When we can cry together, that is the heart's puzzle
It doesn't go smoothly, does it?
The destination of the puzzle of you and me

There will surely be fun things, but
More important than that
When you're sad, when you're happy
When we can cry together, that is the heart's rhythm
Don't cry don't cry
Walk hand in hand

There will surely be fun things, but

scenes.description: The song performance ends, and Jofutei Raden talks to the audience in an art studio setting.
